articles.title: Envision Energy Partners with Impact Electrons Siam to Develop Southeast Asia's Largest Future Energy System in Laos
articles.description: SHANGHAI , June 1, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Envision Energy, a global leader in green technology, has signed a strategic partnership with Impact Electrons Siam (IES), one of Southeast Asia's leading renewable energy developers, to jointly advance the landmark cross-border Monsoon Wind Power Project in Laos. The collaboration is expected to add significant wind power, solar, and energy storage capacity, creating Southeast Asia's largest Future Energy System, an AI-powered energy infrastructure that integrates energy systems with intelligent systems, and substantially expanding the region's integrated clean energy capacity. The signing ceremony was attended by Malaythong Kommasith, Minister of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) of Lao PDR, Edward Hou, Senior Vice President & President of Asia-Pacific Region at Envision Energy; and Peck Khamkanist, Executive Chairman of Impact Electrons Siam. The project marks a significant step in Laos' transformation from a hydro-dominated power exporter toward a regional hub for diversified clean energy development, setting a benchmark for integrated renewable energy development across ASEAN. Leveraging ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

articles.title: Cuenca, Batangas warns residents as heat index may hit dangerous 48°C
articles.description: LUCENA CITY — Despite the onset of the rainy season, the local government of Cuenca town in Batangas has advised residents to take precautionary measures as the heat index in the area may reach a dangerous 48 degrees Celsius on Monday, June 1. “The heat index in our town today may reach the ‘danger’ level. Due to the combination of heat and humidity, the temperature felt by the body is higher than the actual air temperature,” the town’s Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Office (DRRMO) said in a Filipino-language public advisory posted on its Facebook page at 11:30 a.m. The [...]... Keep on reading: Cuenca, Batangas warns residents as heat index may hit dangerous 48°C

articles.title: Horoscope for Monday, June 01, 2026
articles.description:
Moon Alert

Avoid shopping (except food and gas) and important decisions until 8:45 p.m. After that, the moon moves from Sagittarius into Capricorn.

Aries (March 21-April 19)

A positive day

For the next month, home and family will be a stronger focus for you. Family discussions will take place, and no doubt many of you will explore doing repairs and DIY projects. It's a fast-paced week. Short trips and opportunities to meet new faces and see new places will please you.

Taurus (April 20-May 20)

An average day

With fiery Mars in your sign, you have the energy to work and accomplish what you want. Financial matters are a focus. (Who is surprised? After all, you are the financial wizard of the zodiac.) Enjoy the beauty of your daily surroundings. Group discussions and conversations will increase.

Gemini (May 21-June 20)

An average day

This is a strong time for you because the sun is in your sign! (It's your turn to recharge your batteries for the rest of the year.) Meanwhile, today Mercury enters your money house, turning your attention to whatever you value in life — money, material things or intellectual and spiritual ideas.

Cancer (June 21-July 22)

An average day

Today Mercury enters your sign to stay until it goes retrograde on the 29th. Finally, on July 23, it will stop being retrograde and move forward until it leaves your sign on Aug. 10. This long sojourn will make you keen to talk, travel and learn more.

Leo (July 23-Aug. 22)

A positive day

You're popular this week, which means you'll be more involved with friends, groups and organizations. However, you will also be doing work behind the scenes, either by working alone or doing research. For some, a secret love affair will begin.

Virgo (Aug. 23-Sept. 22)

An average day

You make a favorable impression on everyone this week! Today, Mercury moves into your house of friendships to stay for the next six weeks, highlighting group ideals and standards. You might encounter younger people. You will definitely give thought to your goals.

Libra (Sept. 23-Oct. 22)

A positive day

You're eager for a change of scenery and a chance to break free of your routine, which is why many of you want to travel. Meanwhile, today Mercury moves to the top of your chart to stay for the next six weeks, causing you to make plans for your future. Ideas?

Scorpio (Oct. 23-Nov. 21)

An average day

Continue to be patient with partners, close friends and spouses while fiery Mars is opposite your sign this month. Meanwhile, today Mercury changes signs, which will encourage you to study and learn as much as possible in the next six weeks. Travel will also appeal to you.

Sagittarius (Nov. 22-Dec. 21)

A positive day

Remember that you need more rest this month. Nevertheless, Mars will compensate by boosting your energy to work and accomplish a lot. Today, Mercury changes sign, which will highlight discussions and negotiations about shared property, taxes and debt.

Capricorn (Dec. 22-Jan. 19)

An average day

You're keen to work hard and get things done; however, you also want to socialize and get involved in competitive sports. Romance will be hot. Today, Mercury moves opposite your sign to stay for six weeks, encouraging discussions with partners and close friends.

Aquarius (Jan. 20-Feb. 18)

A positive day

The tone of the next several weeks is pleasure and fun. Socialize as much as possible. Enjoy outings, activities with kids, sports events and the arts. Nevertheless, you will accomplish a lot at work because you're ready to dig in.

Pisces (Feb. 19-March 20)

An average day

Home and family are your focus. Nevertheless, travel appeals, and your conversations with others are enthusiastic. Today, Mercury changes signs, moving into the most playful part of your chart, encouraging social outings, romance and fun activities with kids.

If today is your birthday

Actor Morgan Freeman (1937) shares your birthday today. You are inquisitive and intrigued by human behavior. You're also progressive and affectionate. This year, you will reap the benefits of all your hard work. Expect power and leadership; it's a year for major decisions and accomplishments. Promotions, awards and kudos will put the spotlight on you.

articles.title: The enigmatic summer phenomenon shining from the edge of space
articles.description: With no recorded sightings before 1885, noctilucent clouds have been linked to volcanoes, pollution or climate change As summer arrives in the northern hemisphere, so do the noctilucent clouds – hopefully. These high-altitude formations are as enigmatic as they are beautiful. Their name derives from Latin, meaning “night shining”. They appear during the summer months and glow with an electric-blue intensity against the darkening western sky. Look for them about half an hour after sunset. Continue reading...

articles.title: New solar desalination breakthrough makes fresh water without toxic brine
articles.description: Scientists have developed a solar desalination system that turns seawater into drinking water without creating environmentally damaging brine. Special laser-textured metal panels use sunlight to evaporate water while automatically moving salt deposits away from the working surface, preventing clogging. The process was successfully tested with water from three oceans and can recover nearly all salts as solids. Those leftover materials could even become a source of valuable lithium for batteries.
